data.title: Chairman of the China-Britain Business Council calls on the US government to act rationally and get out of the tariff war quagmire
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The 2025 Global Trade and Investment Promotion Summit was held in Beijing. Sir Anthony Culbertson, Chairman of the China-Britain Business Council, was interviewed on the spot. Sir Anthony Culbertson said that he sincerely hoped that the US government would listen to the voice of the market, act rationally and negotiate in a friendly manner to get out of the current quagmire of the tariff war. (Jinshi)

data.title: SOON releases token economics: initial total supply is 1 billion, 51% allocated to the community
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SOON released token economics, with an initial total supply of 1 billion SOON (annual inflation rate of 3%). The initial launch chains include Solana, BNB Chain and Base. The utility functions of the token are governance rights, native assets, builder rewards, and fast finality security based on staking.
Among them: 51% is allocated to the community; 25% is allocated to the ecosystem; 8% is allocated to airdrops/liquidity; 6% is allocated to the foundation/treasury; 10% is allocated to the team and co-builders.

data.title: Singapore advises against tit-for-tat tariffs as economy faces technical recession risk
data.description:
Asian economies need to stay agile and avoid tit-for-tat tariff retaliation, a deputy managing director of the Monetary Authority of Singapore said on Friday. At the meeting, Robinson, who is also a MAS chief economist, said retaliatory tariffs shift supply negatively. Reuters reported that he warned they would worsen the growth-inflation trade-off and complicate monetary […]

data.title: XRP News: XRP Price Stalls Despite ETF Buzz and Ripple’s SEC Victory — Is a $3.50 Rally Still on the Table?
data.description: Key HighlightsXRP declined 6% over the past three months, despite broader market gains of 10%.Ripple concluded its legal case with the SEC on May 8, 2025.XRP was listed as a potential U.S. Digital Asset Reserve candidate earlier this year.Futures open interest in XRP reached $2.2 billion as of May 22, reflecting increased trading activity.XRP Trails Market Despite Positive DevelopmentsWhile the total cryptocurrency market cap has grown 10% in the past quarter, XRP’s price has moved in the opposite direction — recording a 6% decline in the same timeframe.This performance comes despite two notable events:Ripple's settlement with the U.S. SEC on May 8, 2025.XRP’s inclusion in the shortlist for the U.S. Digital Asset Reserve in March 2025.Derivatives Metrics Show Rising Market ActivityXRP futures open interest across major exchanges rose to 923 million XRP by May 22, equivalent to approximately $2.2 billion. This represents a 31% increase from two weeks earlier.Funding rates — a metric that reflects demand for leverage — reached an annualized 19% on the same date. This level exceeds the commonly observed neutral range of 7% to 14%.These metrics indicate heightened trading activity but do not necessarily imply directional market sentiment.Regulatory Progress Continues, but Legislative Engagement Remains LimitedRipple concluded its legal proceedings with the SEC, potentially clarifying regulatory standing in the United States.Despite this, direct engagement with U.S. lawmakers remains limited. No new policy changes or legislative support specific to XRP or Ripple were announced as of the publication date.Key Factors Influencing XRP in the Coming MonthsEventEstimated TimingSpot XRP ETF decisionQ4 2025On-chain activity developmentsOngoingRegulatory updates in the U.S.PendingMarket-wide sentiment shiftsVariable The above developments may influence trading volumes, investor interest, and market volatility in the XRP ecosystem.Market Outlook: Caution Persists Amid DevelopmentsWhile XRP has seen notable ecosystem and regulatory updates in 2025, its price action continues to diverge from broader market trends. The sustainability of increased derivatives activity remains uncertain.As of now, no official approval has been granted for a spot XRP ETF, and market response to prior developments appears measured.

data.title: Ripple Lawsuit News: Ex-SEC Attorney Opens Up About New ‘Corrected Filing’
data.description:
S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has taken an unexpected turn — and XRP holders are once again left in suspense. Judge Analisa Torres rejected a joint request from both Ripple and the SEC to finalize their proposed settlement agreement
source: https://coinpedia.org/uncategorized/ripple-lawsuit-news-ex-sec-attorney-opens-up-about-new-corrected-filing/

data.title: Justin Sun attended President Trump's dinner and delivered a speech: Thank you President for supporting the crypto industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On the morning of May 23rd, Beijing time, US President Trump held a "Trump Dinner" with the top 220 TRUMP token holders at his private golf club. Huobi HTX Global Advisor and TRON founder Justin Sun attended and spoke as the largest TRUMP holder. He said, "Thank you very much for what the Trump administration has done for our industry. Not long ago, crypto people were constantly oppressed, and it was impossible for us to hold such a grand event in Washington to bring all practitioners together in the United States to build the crypto industry. This is the best thing I can think of. If I can come to the United States, then everyone can come."

data.title: HYPE whale shorted 5 times and closed its position, losing up to $23.522 million in 30 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Hypurrscan data, the whale that previously shorted 1.875 million HYPE at 5x has closed its position at $34.633 2 hours ago. The previous position value of the address was as high as $17.363 million, and the current position value is $6.985 million; the loss in 30 days was as high as $23.522 million; the loss in 7 days was as high as $11.803 million; the loss in 24 hours was as high as $5.248 million.
Previously, a whale opened a position on Hyperliquid and shorted 1.875 million HYPE at 5x; on the 22nd, it deposited 2.05 million USDC into HyperLiquid to increase the margin for its 5x short HYPE position. At that time, its floating loss was $18.88 million, and the liquidation price was $32.67,

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of US$935 million yesterday, continuing a net inflow for 7 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 22, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$935 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$877 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$47.554 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$48.6615 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.878 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$134.295 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Bitcoin's total market value) is 6.09%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.315 billion.
